nodes.name: docker.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite CI pipeline definition for building and publishing RisingWave Docker images, with auto-retry configuration and step definitions.

nodes.name: gen-flamegraph-cron.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite cron pipeline definition that periodically triggers flamegraph generation for profiling RisingWave performance.

nodes.name: gen-flamegraph.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite pipeline definition for generating CPU flamegraph profiles of RisingWave under load, used for performance analysis.

nodes.name: integration-tests.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite pipeline definition for running integration tests against external systems and connectors.

nodes.name: main-cron-bisect.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite pipeline definition for running git bisect on the main branch cron to identify regressions in nightly CI runs.

nodes.name: main-cron.yml
nodes.summary: Large Buildkite nightly cron pipeline (1337 lines) orchestrating the full suite of integration tests, e2e tests, benchmarks, and release jobs on the main branch.

nodes.name: pull-request.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite pull-request pipeline (991 lines) defining all CI checks run on PRs, including build, lint, unit tests, e2e tests, and SQL backend variants.

nodes.name: sqlsmith-snapshots.yml
nodes.summary: Buildkite pipeline definition for running SQLsmith random query generation and capturing snapshots for regression testing.
